definition.name: Full Stack
definition.description: Cache + API + frontend — a production-like 3-chart stack with deploy ordering.

charts.default_values:
replicaCount: 1
resources:
  requests:
    cpu: 10m
    memory: 16Mi
  limits:
    cpu: 100m
    memory: 64Mi
service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 9898
cache: memory
ui:
  message: Cache Layer

replicaCount: 2
resources:
  requests:
    cpu: 20m
    memory: 32Mi
  limits:
    cpu: 200m
    memory: 128Mi
service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 9898
cacheServer: tcp://cache-podinfo:9898
ui:
  message: API Service

replicaCount: 1
resources:
  requests:
    cpu: 10m
    memory: 16Mi
  limits:
    cpu: 100m
    memory: 64Mi
service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 9898
backendURL: http://api-podinfo:9898
ui:
  message: Frontend
